description: Domain-name discovery & availability CLI — RDAP-native, WHOIS-fallback, Porkbun-priced, with offline shortlist + scoring + drop watch.

tools.name: pricing_get
tools.description: Fetch the full TLD pricing table (registration, renewal, transfer) from Porkbun. Returns the PricingResponse.

tools.name: rdap_bootstrap_get
tools.description: Fetch the IANA RDAP DNS bootstrap (TLD → RDAP base URL). Returns the RDAPBootstrap.
